title: ozanonia borbasii
intro: Ozanonia borbasii, also known as the Philippine water lily or water hyacinth, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Arum. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of fever and rheumatism. The health benefits of Ozanonia borbasii include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and even reduce the risk of certain cancers. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve making a tea from its leaves or roots, which can be used to treat various ailments.
